## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Preset tuning
- [ ] DSP optimization
- [ ] Installer / release package
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Testing

- [ ] DSP smoke test passed
- [ ] Windows local build passed
- [ ] OBS can load the plugin
- [ ] Audio checked with MasAri preset
- [ ] No local build artifacts committed

## Audio notes

Describe any listening changes, especially bass, treble, stereo width, vocal body, clipping, limiter behavior, or harshness.
